CharacterVotes.title: CharacterVotes
CharacterVotes.description: Stores the accumulated vote count for a specific fictional chatbot character.

characterId.description: Unique identifier matching the character ID in characters.ts.

votes.description: Total number of votes accumulated for this character.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this vote record was last updated.

votes/{characterId}.description: Collection where each document represents the voting stats for a single character.
